description: FCC broadband availability, coverage analysis, and digital divide data for US geographies.
name: io.github.cyanheads/fcc-broadband-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: FCC account email for BDC API. Required for fcc_list_downloads and BDC filing periods.
environmentVariables.name: FCC_BDC_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: API token hash from broadbandmap.fcc.gov Manage API Access page.
environmentVariables.name: FCC_BDC_HASH_VALUE

environmentVariables.description: Socrata app token for FCC Open Data. Increases rate limits; not required.
environmentVariables.name: FCC_OPENDATA_APP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Serve Form 477 queries from a local SQLite mirror when its coverage allows (bootstrap with `bun run mirror:init`). Default: false.
environmentVariables.name: FCC_MIRROR_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Directory holding the Form 477 mirror SQLite files.
environmentVariables.name: FCC_MIRROR_PATH

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
